user_query: I want information about the occupation Pig Breed and the dollowing skills: manage technical aspects, pest controlling and maintain plant growth. Also, tell me information about the agricultural technician job. Also tell me where the agricultural technitian job is

occupations.label: pig breeder
occupations.description: Pig breeders oversee the production and day-to-day care of pigs. They maintain the health and welfare of pigs.

occupations.label: poultry breeder
occupations.description: Poultry breeders oversee the production and day-to-day care of poultry. They maintain the health and welfare of poultry.

jobs.label: Agronomic R&D Technician | Agronomist
jobs.description:
AGROLOGY is a dynamically developing industry with more than 40 years of experience in the development, standardization and distribution of Plant Protection Products and Specialized Crop Nutrition Products, both in the Greek market and in foreign countries. As part of its continuous investments in the Research & Development Department, the company wishes to hire an Agronomist to fill the following position:
 
                                                Agronomic R&D Technician | Agronomist
                                                                              Based in Crete
 
Position Description
Development of innovative products and applications, experimentation and support of the Commercial Department.
The position reports to the Agronomic R&D Manager.
 
Candidate Profile

Agronomist Plant Production Graduate A.E.I.
Experience relevant to the subject is essential
Excellent knowledge of English
Excellent knowledge of MS Office applications
Professionalism, dynamism, teamwork, responsibility
Immediate availability

 
Company benefits

Competitive remuneration package
Modern work environment
Development prospects
Ongoing support and training

skills.label: manage technical security systems
skills.description: Verify the operation of technical security systems such as cameras, badge readers or X-ray machines.

skills.label: manage technical resources stock
skills.description: Manage and monitor technical resources stock to ensure that production demands and deadlines can be met at all times.

skills.label: pest control in plants
skills.description: Types and features of pests in plants and crops. Different kinds of pest control methods, activities using conventional or biological methods taking into account the type of plant or crop, environmental and climate conditions and health and safety regulations. Storage and handling of products.

skills.label: perform pest control
skills.description: Carry out crop spraying pest and disease operations in line with National industry and customer requirements. Carry out slurry and fertiliser spreading in accordance with local environmental regulations.

skills.label: maintain plants' growth
skills.description: Support growth, appearance and intended purpose of the plants.

skills.label: maintain plant health
skills.description: Manage and support overall plant health. Practice sustainable gardening techniques and integrated pest management in gardens both outdoor and indoor.
